CREATE TABLE texts (id UInt32, content String);
INSERT INTO texts VALUES (1, '二兎を追う者は一兎をも得ず'), (2, 'A vaincre sans peril, on triomphe sans gloire.');
SELECT detectLanguageMixed(content) FROM texts WHERE id = 1;
SELECT detectLanguageMixed(content) AS languages FROM texts WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT id, detectLanguageMixed(content) FROM texts WHERE content LIKE '%追う%';
CREATE TABLE language_counts AS SELECT id, detectLanguageMixed(content) AS language_map FROM texts;
SELECT id, language_map['ja'] AS japanese_percentage FROM language_counts WHERE language_map['ja'] > 5.0;
SELECT id, detectLanguageMixed(content) AS mixed_languages FROM texts WHERE detectLanguageMixed(content) IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, detectLanguageMixed(content) AS language_details, language_map['fr'] AS french_percentage FROM (SELECT id, detectLanguageMixed(content) FROM texts) AS l_table WHERE language_map['fr'] >= 10.0;

WITH language_data AS (SELECT detectLanguageMixed(content) AS lang_map FROM texts) SELECT lang_map['ja'] AS japanese, lang_map['fr'] AS french FROM language_data WHERE lang_map['ja'] > 0.0 OR lang_map['fr'] > 0.0;
